workspace_mapping.format: The first line of the JSONL file contains 'session_meta' with a 'cwd' field mapping the session to the workspace.
workspace_mapping.session_link: session_index.jsonl maintains a global index of all rollouts.

git_state: ~/.codex/memories/.git (The markdown memory system is strictly version-controlled natively)
recommended_extractors: Parse the markdown files in ~/.codex/memories/ as they provide a pre-consolidated, highly structured view of the project state.
Read goals_1.sqlite to extract active tasks and their completion status.
Parse the session_meta events in transcripts to map rollouts to workspaces.
